nasb.text: And behold, Jesus met them and greeted them. And they came up and took hold of His feet and worshiped Him.

esv.text: And behold, Jesus met them and said, “Greetings!” And they came up and took hold of his feet and worshiped him.

cnv.text: 忽然，耶穌向她們迎面而來，說：“你們好。”她們就上前，抱住他的腳拜他。

ccb.text: 忽然，耶稣迎面而来，对她们说：“愿你们平安！”她们就上前抱住祂的脚敬拜祂。

csbs.text: 这时候，忽然耶稣迎面而来，说：“愿你们欢喜！”她们就上前来抱住他的脚拜他。
